actions.name: Create DEV.to draft
actions.description: Verifies a per-user DEV API key, checks duplicates, and creates a draft DEV article.

parameters.name: Mode
parameters.description: Whether to verify a DEV API key or create a draft.

parameters.name: DEV API key
parameters.description: Per-user DEV API key used only for this action call.

parameters.name: Contentful entry ID
parameters.description: Entry ID used by the function to fetch and generate the DEV draft payload.

parameters.name: Contentful locale
parameters.description: Locale code used to read localized entry fields.

functions.name: Create DEV.to draft
functions.description: Verifies a per-user DEV API key, checks duplicates, and creates a draft DEV article.
